name: Khun Chai Tum Raberd
original_name: คุณชายตำระเบิด
overview: When a skilled papaya salad vendor suddenly becomes a millionaire thanks to a lucky lottery ticket, his once simple life changes. He has to take his family away from his uninvited relatives to Bangkok to start living like a rich person. What's more, he...
